fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies this number from the Tracking Specification table when a lot number information record is created.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies this number from the Tracking Specification table when a lot number information record is created.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the lot no. information record.

fields.name: Test Quality
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quality of a given lot if you have inspected the items.

fields.name: Certificate Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number provided by the supplier to indicate that the batch or lot meets the specified requirements.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment has been recorded for the lot number.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory quantity of the specified lot number.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
For more information, see How to: Enter Dates and Times.

fields.name: Location Filter
fields.tooltip:
Displays the filter that filters by location.
If the field contains a location code, then the values in the Inventory field and the Expired Inventory field are based only on entries with the location code that is included in the filter.

fields.name: Bin Filter
fields.tooltip:
Displays the filter that filters by bin code.
If the field contains a bin code, the Inventory and the Expired Inventory field values are based only on item tracking entries with the bin code that is included in the filter.


Meaning


Sample Expression


Included


Equal to

1

Entries with 1 as the bin code


Interval

1...5

Entries from bin 1 through bin 5


Either/or

B22|C22

Entries with either bin code B22 or C22


Different than

<>bin1

Entries with all bin codes except bin 1


To see the bin codes in the Bin table, choose the field.

fields.name: Expired Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory of the lot number with an expiration date before the posting date on the associated document.
